Product overview

What Are Our Magnesium Glycinate Capsules?

Are you constantly feeling drained and restless, but don't want to rely on artificial solutions for your well-being? Then try our natural Magnesium Glycinate Capsules today!

Each serving of our supplements offers 1420mg of magnesium bisglycinate, enriched with 2mg of vitamin B6, a powerful combination made for your wellness. You get 180 easy-to-swallow capsules in one bottle for a steady 3-month supply without reordering hassles.

Taking just two vegan Magnesium Bisglycinate Capsules a day offers a convenient way to harness the benefits of magnesium glycinate. Get ready to feel the difference with our pure Magnesium Bisglycinate Capsules today!

Benefits of Magnesium Glycinate Capsules

Our pure magnesium bisglycinate supplement provides the most easily absorbed form of magnesium, which, as per the European Food Safety Authority (EFSA) -

  • Contributes to normal energy-yielding metabolism*
  • Contributes to a reduction of tiredness and fatigue*
  • Contributes to the maintenance of normal bones and teeth*
  • Contributes to electrolyte balance*
  • Contributes to normal muscle function*
  • Magnesium contributes to normal protein synthesis*
  • Contributes to the normal functioning of the nervous system*
  • Contributes to normal psychological function*
  • Additionally, our Magnesium Bisglycinate Capsules are enriched with vitamin B6, which
  • Contributes to the normal function of the immune system*
  • Contributes to the regulation of hormonal activity*
  • Contributes to normal energy-yielding metabolism*
  • Contributes to normal protein and glycogen metabolism*
  • Contributes to normal red blood cell formation*
Why Choose Our Magnesium Glycinate Capsules?

*These health claims are authorised by the European Food Safety Authority (EFSA).

  • Check below to find out why our pure Magnesium Bisglycinate Capsules stand out from the regular magnesium supplements on the market
  • Made with 20+ years of industry experience in making premium wellness supplements and devices
  • High-strength 1420mg of pure magnesium bisglycinate per serving, more than most competitors offer today
  • Enriched with 2mg of vitamin B6 for extra support, offering benefits beyond magnesium as found in regular magnesium supplements
  • 100% free from allergens GMOs and magnesium stearate, so you can enjoy the benefits without any known side effects
  • Vegan-friendly capsules, suitable for those following a vegan or vegetarian lifestyle
  • 180 capsules per bottle, providing you with a full 3-month supply without the hassle of frequent reordering
  • Packaged in recyclable PET bottles to lower our carbon footprint and be a more sustainable choice for you
  • Backed by our 90-day money-back guarantee, so you can try it completely risk-free
How to use

Take 2 capsules daily with water, preferably with a meal.

Ingredients

Caspsule Shell: Hypromellose (HPMC)

Nutritional information

Serving Size: 2 Capsules Servings per Container : 90

Amount per servingAmount%NRV
Magnesium Glycinate710 mg
PROVIDING Elemental Magnesium100 mg53
Vitamin B6 (Pyridoxine Hydrochloride)1 mg142
Advice and storage

Do not exceed the recommended daily dose. Food supplements must not be used as a substitute for a varied and balanced diet and a healthy lifestyle. If you are pregnant, breastfeeding, taking any medications, or are under medical supervision, please consult a doctor or healthcare professional before use. Discontinue use and consult a doctor if any adverse reactions occur. Not intended for use by persons under the age of 18.

Store in a cool, dry place. Keep out of reach of children. For best before end see the base.
